Who I Am

About Me

I'm a 3rd-year B.Tech CSE undergraduate at KIIT Bhubaneswar with a strong passion for front-end development and graphic design. I possess hands-on skills in C, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and I enjoy creating interfaces that are both beautiful and functional.

Eager to learn, contribute, and grow through real-world experiences, I have had the opportunity to intern across web development, graphic design, and human resources — each role sharpening a different edge of my creative and professional skill set.
